description: Required private capability baseline aligned to public Karma system

capabilities.title: Fake receipt identification
capabilities.acceptance: Can classify suspicious/forged execution receipts and emit risk signals

capabilities.title: Execution truthfulness verification
capabilities.acceptance: Can evaluate whether claimed execution evidence is materially authentic

capabilities.title: Risk scoring model
capabilities.acceptance: Produces stable risk score/band for settlement and operations decisions

capabilities.title: Arbitration weighting rules
capabilities.acceptance: Supports weighted arbitration recommendation with explainable factors

capabilities.title: Anti-wash and anti-abuse strategy
capabilities.acceptance: Detects wash/self-dealing and abuse patterns under operational load

capabilities.title: Responsibility cycle detection (private enrichment)
capabilities.acceptance: Finds high-risk cyclical responsibility paths beyond public structural checks

capabilities.title: Identity risk scoring
capabilities.acceptance: Maintains identity-level risk profile used by private policy decisions

capabilities.title: Dispute decision assistance
capabilities.acceptance: Provides private recommendation artifacts for dispute resolution pipeline

capabilities.title: Malicious agent detection
capabilities.acceptance: Detects malicious agent behavior patterns and escalation conditions

capabilities.title: High-risk scenario recognition
capabilities.acceptance: Recognizes pre-defined high-risk scenarios and outputs mitigation guidance

capabilities.title: Private operations SOP runtime support
capabilities.acceptance: Supports operational runbooks for emergency handling and controlled rollback
